item.title: [Gold Job] Master SDPO | Offshore Supply Vessel at
[Gold Job] We're Hiring: Chief Officer SDPO at

item.description:
Location: European Union
Description:

Experienced personnel are sought for immediate offshore opportunities on a drillship in the European Union. Open positions include Electrician, Mechanic, Electronic Technician, Dynamic Positioning Officer (DPO), Assistant Driller, and Crane Operator. Candidates must have previous drillship experience, valid offshore certifications, and be available in the coming weeks. Visa restrictions may apply.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Drillship Crew Vacancies at Offshore Jobs

item.description:
Location: Saudi Arabia (Aramco project)
Description:

Qualified Chief Engineers, Second Engineers, Third Engineers, ETOs, Electricians, and Crane Operators are sought for a Self-Propelled Jack-Up Barge operating on an Aramco project. Minimum experience requirements vary by position, generally requiring 1-3 years on similar vessels. Joining is upon provisional approval and KSA visa issuance, or immediate for some roles. Salary is to be discussed. All documents must be valid for 12 months, and candidates should not hold a valid Saudi Iqama visa.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Engine Officers Crane Operator for SPJUB Vessel at Aavishka Shipping Pvt Ltd

item.description:
Location: Saudi Aramco project
Description:

Qualified Chief Officers, Chief Engineers, Second Engineers, Electricians, and Crane Operators are urgently sought for AHTS and OSV vessels operating on a Saudi Aramco project. Minimum experience requirements vary by position, generally 1-2 years on similar offshore vessels. Contracts are approximately 3-4 months on/off. Joining is as soon as possible once provisional approval is issued. All documents must be valid for over 12 months, and candidates should not hold a valid KSA visa.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Crew Vacancies on AHTS/OSV at Aavishka Marine Services

item.description:
Location: Netherlands
Description:

Explore offshore, marine, and energy sector career opportunities in the Netherlands. Roles may include Mechanical and Electrical Technicians, Offshore Engineers, Crane Operators, Welders, Riggers, Deck Crew, and HSE Officers. Professionals with relevant offshore or industrial experience are invited to submit their CV for consideration for suitable roles. Opportunities are based on project and employer requirements.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Marine Career Opportunities in Netherlands at Offshore Manpower International

item.description:
Location: UAE (ADNOC Project)
Description:

A Third Engineer position is available on a Platform Supply Vessel (PSV) for an ADNOC project in the UAE. Candidates must possess a valid Indian Third Engineer COC/COE and have prior offshore experience as a Third Engineer. Experience specifically on PSVs is mandatory for this role. Direct recruitment is offered with no subagents or middlemen involved.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Third Engineer Job - Offshore PSV (UAE) at Jesseena Human Resources

item.description:
Location: Abu Dhabi
Description:

An experienced HSE Officer is sought for an offshore role in Abu Dhabi. The position requires a Diploma in Engineering or Safety Sciences, a NEBOSH certification, and 5-8 years of relevant experience, including at least 5 years in the Oil & Gas industry. Knowledge of PPE, emergency response, offshore safety, H2S environments, fire systems, and OH&S regulations is essential. UAE or Middle East experience is preferred.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] HSE Officer Job - Offshore Abu Dhabi at Alchemy²

item.description:
Location: UAE
Description:

Seeking experienced Master, Chief Officer, Chief Engineer, and 2nd Engineer for LCT / AHTS / SSRV vessels operating in the UAE. Candidates require relevant unlimited CoC/Diploma and a minimum of 3-4 years of experience in the same rank and vessel type. ADNOC approval is advantageous. This is a significant opportunity to advance your maritime career.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Master, Chief Officer, Engineer Jobs on AHTS Vessels at Marcap

item.description:
Location: Iraq
Description:

Multiple positions are available for skilled drilling crew and support staff for operations in Iraq. Roles include Driller, Assistant Driller, Derrickman, Floor man, Welder, Roustabout, Mechanic, Electrician, Crane Operator, and HSE personnel. This is an opportunity to join offshore oil and gas drilling projects.



Apply to this job
item.title: [AI Job] Offshore Drilling Crew &amp; Support Staff Vacancies at SEA Updates
